infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Dayframe uses location to detect known places and create reviewable activity suggestions.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: Dayframe can monitor geofences in the background so place visits become activity events before they become time entries.
infoPlist.NSHealthShareUsageDescription: Dayframe reads sleep and workout summaries from Apple Health so they become reviewable activity events.
infoPlist.NSHealthUpdateUsageDescription: Dayframe does not write health data.

plugins.NSHealthShareUsageDescription: Dayframe reads sleep and workout summaries from Apple Health so they become reviewable activity events.
plugins.NSHealthUpdateUsageDescription: Dayframe does not write health data.
